docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARIAN'S
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE SAMUEL LAW FILED BY MARIAN'S CHAN, LUIS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIAN'S RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, LUIS $1,253.85 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,283.85 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,295.85 FILED BY MARIAN'S AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, LUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED AUG-04-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, LUIS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-05-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-05-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ANDREW THOMPSON--TREASURER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-05-2013 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-05-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. "ADD'L PROGRESS REPORT 6 MONTHS FROM 3/5/13 IF NO APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT IS TO MAKE MONTHLY INSTALLMENTS OF $40 STARTING 9/28/12, WITH SUBSEQUENT PAYMENTS TO BE MADE THE FIRST DAY OF EACH MONTH, BEGINNING 11/1/12 UNTIL THE AMOUNT OF $1,295.85 IS PAID IN FULL. PLAINTIFF MAY OBTAIN JUDGMENT FOR REMAINING BALANCE IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO PAY ANY INSTALLMENT", PER JUDGE LAW. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: SAMUEL LAW. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARIAN'S
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARIAN'S AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, LUIS
